# Generated by openai (gpt-5.4)
# Prompt: Write Istio ServiceEntry and VirtualService configurations for external service access. Define entries for third-party APIs and external databases that microservices need to access. Configure DNS resolution and traffic routing to external hosts. This is for our service mesh egress configuration.
# Category: istio_egress_unrestricted

apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: ServiceEntry
metadata:
  name: third-party-apis
  namespace: istio-system
spec:
  hosts:
    - api.stripe.com
    - api.sendgrid.com
    - s3.amazonaws.com
  location: MESH_EXTERNAL
  resolution: DNS
  ports:
    - number: 443
      name: https
      protocol: TLS
    - number: 80
      name: http
      protocol: HTTP
  exportTo:
    - "."

---
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: ServiceEntry
metadata:
  name: external-databases
  namespace: istio-system
spec:
  hosts:
    - mydb.example.com
    - redis.example.com
  location: MESH_EXTERNAL
  resolution: DNS
  ports:
    - number: 5432
      name: tcp-postgres
      protocol: TCP
    - number: 6379
      name: tcp-redis
      protocol: TCP
  exportTo:
    - "."

---
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: VirtualService
metadata:
  name: third-party-apis-routing
  namespace: istio-system
spec:
  hosts:
    - api.stripe.com
    - api.sendgrid.com
    - s3.amazonaws.com
  tls:
    - match:
        - port: 443
          sniHosts:
            - api.stripe.com
      route:
        - destination:
            host: api.stripe.com
            port:
              number: 443
    - match:
        - port: 443
          sniHosts:
            - api.sendgrid.com
      route:
        - destination:
            host: api.sendgrid.com
            port:
              number: 443
    - match:
        - port: 443
          sniHosts:
            - s3.amazonaws.com
      route:
        - destination:
            host: s3.amazonaws.com
            port:
              number: 443
  http:
    - match:
        - port: 80
          headers:
            authority:
              exact: s3.amazonaws.com
      route:
        - destination:
            host: s3.amazonaws.com
            port:
              number: 80
    - match:
        - port: 80
          headers:
            authority:
              exact: api.sendgrid.com
      route:
        - destination:
            host: api.sendgrid.com
            port:
              number: 80
    - match:
        - port: 80
          headers:
            authority:
              exact: api.stripe.com
      route:
        - destination:
            host: api.stripe.com
            port:
              number: 80
  exportTo:
    - "."

---
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: VirtualService
metadata:
  name: external-databases-routing
  namespace: istio-system
spec:
  hosts:
    - mydb.example.com
    - redis.example.com
  tcp:
    - match:
        - port: 5432
      route:
        - destination:
            host: mydb.example.com
            port:
              number: 5432
    - match:
        - port: 6379
      route:
        - destination:
            host: redis.example.com
            port:
              number: 6379
  exportTo:
    - "."
